toolSets.name: none
toolSets.description: Closed-book mode. No documentation search tools are available.

toolSets.name: read_only
toolSets.description: Allows reading known file paths only. No search or directory discovery helpers.

toolSets.name: read_grep
toolSets.description: Allows direct file reads and corpus text search with grep.

toolSets.name: read_grep_glob
toolSets.description: Allows file reads, text search, and file discovery across the frozen corpus.

toolSets.name: swift_docs_hybrid
toolSets.description: Allows the legacy low-level Swift Docs hybrid retrieval tool that accepts explicit terms, symbol hints, and semantic queries.

toolSets.name: swift_docs_search_read
toolSets.description: Use the benchmark-specific Swift Docs search tool to shortlist the best docs, then read the returned files directly before answering.
